name: Section
description: A token-based layout section with configurable width, spacing, surface, alignment, and an inner content region.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Section
attribute_definition_groups.description: A token-based layout section with configurable width, spacing, surface, alignment, and an inner content region.

attribute_definitions.name: Anchor ID
attribute_definitions.description: Optional HTML anchor used for links to this section. Do not include the # character.

attribute_definitions.name: Surface
attribute_definitions.description: Theme-token surface and its matching text color.

attribute_definitions.name: Vertical Spacing
attribute_definitions.description: Responsive space above and below the section content.

attribute_definitions.name: Content Width
attribute_definitions.description: Maximum width of the inner content region.

attribute_definitions.name: Text Alignment
attribute_definitions.description: Default text alignment inherited by content in the section.
